_doc: C2M2 disease CV term table -> one schema.org DefinedTerm per row. All 14 C2M2 controlled-vocabulary tables share this shape (they live together under mappings/cv/ as a class of their own): @id is the resolved ontology IRI (so an edge pointing at the term lands on this node); name<-name (falls back to the CURIE); termCode<-the raw CV id (CURIE); identifier<-the resolved ontology IRI; description<-description (falls back to a generated sentence); synonym<-the parsed 'synonyms' JSON array. 'usedBy' back-references the biosamples/subjects that cite this term.

fields.template: C2M2 disease controlled-vocabulary term {curie}{onto_suffix}, referenced by the {dcc_label} instance.

associations._note: Back-reference: match is THIS disease node (resolved from biosample_disease.disease); the value is the biosample that used it.
Back-reference: subjects that cite this disease (observed or ruled-out both count as 'used').
